name: Ezra 24x40 Garage Shed Plan - A Three-Bay Garage with Rustic Warmth & Expansive Storage
open_features: A spacious footprint designed to house multiple vehicles, tools, machinery, and hobby equipment - with room to grow.
Clear layouts, simple framing, and beginner-friendly instructions make this garage accessible for first-time builders and seasoned pros.
Three large bay doors with upper window panels offer easy, smooth entry for vehicles, ATVs, trailers, lawn gear, and workshop materials.
Golden horizontal wood siding, white architectural trim, and a high gable roof create a rustic-modern balance with standout curb appeal.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Ezra Garage Shed Plan - a 24x40 multi-bay garage, workshop, and storage solution designed for maximum space, clean architectural lines, and welcoming rustic style. Featuring a tall gable roof, golden-toned wood siding, crisp white trim, and three oversized garage bays, the Ezra blends timeless charm with functional everyday performance. Whether you're building a large vehicle garage, a full-scale workshop, lawn and equipment hub, or a hybrid hobby...
